text:
Published

on

By

Super Falcons head coach, Randy Waldrum has released his starting line-up for tonight’s Olympic Games qualifying fixture against the Indomitable Lionesses of Cameroon.

Paris FC’s Chiamaka Nnadozie will start in goal.

Michelle Alozie, Osinachi Ohale, Oluwatosin Demehin and Ashleigh Plumptre will operate from the defence.

The midfield trio comprises of Halimat Ayinde, Christy Ucheibe and Deborah Abiodun.

Africa’s women’s best player, Asisat Oshoala will lead the attack.

Oshoala will be supported by Rasheedat Ajibade and Toni Payne.

The encounter billed for Stade de la Reunification, Douala will kick-off at 6pm.

Super Falcons X1 Vs Cameroon

Nnadozie

Alozie, Ohale, Demehin, Plumptre

Ayinde, Ucheibe, Abiodun

Ajibade, Oshoala, Payne.
